name: ARP Cache Poisoning - ARP Spoofing Tool Detection
description: Detects ARP cache poisoning and ARP spoofing tools including arpspoof, ettercap, bettercap, and IP forwarding enablement for MitM positioning.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.name : ("arpspoof", "ettercap", "bettercap") or process.args : ("arp.spoof", "net.sniff", "arpspoof") or (process.args : "*ip_forward*" and process.args : "1"))
